creative_brief.visual_style: Clean and modern aesthetic that emphasizes sleek, minimalistic design elements. Use high-resolution imagery that highlights the product's innovative features and sophisticated finish.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Aspirational storytelling with a focus on innovation and lifestyle enhancement. Use influencer partnerships and high-quality video content to demonstrate product benefits and real-world application.
creative_brief.typography_style: Sans-serif typeface like Helvetica Neue for a clean, modern look that aligns with the brand's innovative image. Use varying weights to create hierarchy and emphasis where needed.
creative_brief.color_scheme: A refined palette featuring metallic accents like silver or chrome paired with deep, neutral tones such as charcoal and black to convey a sense of elegance and technological advancement.
